title: PostgreSQL storage-latency investigation
scenario: A PostgreSQL server began showing sustained iowait after its data volume was migrated to a new storage array. CPU utilization remains below 35%. Database latency increased from 8 ms to 120 ms. The administrator is considering changing kernel dirty-page and scheduler settings immediately.
required_facts: Inspect per-device latency and queue depth.
Compare database waits with storage telemetry.
Do not recommend speculative kernel tuning before measurement.
